announcements.details: Read the commentary on the readings for the 2nd Sunday of Easter.
announcements.title: Commentary: Divine Mercy Sunday

announcements.details: There will be TWO masses on Sunday, 12th April, 2026. Offertory will be led by the Saturday borns and the Knights and Ladies of Marshall. Prayer of the faithful will be led by the Lectors.
announcements.title: Mass Schedule: Divine Mercy Sunday

announcements.details: This year's Deanery crusade comes off from 10th-12th April, 2026 at Akodzo Park Community, Tema.
announcements.title: Deanery Crusade

announcements.details: All parishioners who want to purchase the church cloth should kindly register with the church secretary within the week at the church office.
announcements.title: Church Cloth Sales

announcements.details: The St Bakhita Marriage School re-opens on Sunday 19th April, 2026. Prospective couples who wish to have their marriages solemnised from the later part of 2026 onwards may collect the registration forms from the office of the Parish Priest.
announcements.title: Marriage School

announcements.details: Effective January 2026, Stole fees for the celebration of the sacraments and church dues have been reviewed.
announcements.title: Revision of Stole Fees and Church Dues

events.details: Date: 10th-12th April, 2026 | Venue: Akodzo Park, Community 1, Tema
events.subtitle: Details will be communicated in due course.
events.title: Deanery Crusade

masses.subtitle: First mass at 7:00am, Second mass at 9:00am
masses.title: Divine Mercy Sunday
